summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AdPhantom CRM application. Backend APIs are fully functional, frontend login and branding issues were identified and partially fixed.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 500 due to missing Claude API key
minor_issues.note: Expected behavior - API key not configured

ui_bugs.issue: Login process sometimes hangs with 'Iniciando sesión...' state
ui_bugs.note: Intermittent issue - login worked in some test runs but failed in others

integration_issues.issue: Frontend API URL was misconfigured (localhost:8000 vs localhost:8001)
integration_issues.fix_applied: Updated API_URL in /app/frontend/src/utils/api.js from port 8000 to 8001

passed_tests: Backend API authentication with admin@adphantom.com / admin123
User management API endpoints (create, read, update, delete users)
Funnel statistics API with date filters (daily, weekly, monthly, custom)
AdPhantom branding fix on login page

success_percentage.backend: 94% (15/16 tests passed - only AI Tools failed due to missing API key)
success_percentage.frontend: 70% (login works intermittently, branding fixed, navigation visible when logged in)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend login reliability issue - login process sometimes hangs. The API endpoints work correctly (verified via backend tests), but the frontend login form occasionally gets stuck in 'Iniciando sesión...' state. This appears to be a frontend timing or error handling issue.
